NAVAREA XIX 148/17

1.RIGLIST CORRECT AT 171830 UTC DEC 17.

NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.

72-12.0N - 019-42.1E LEIV EIRIKSSON
67-04.4N - 007-02.6E TRANSOCEAN SPITSBERGEN
65-10.3N - 006-51.5E SONGA ENCOURAGE
65-13.5N - 006-25.5E DEEPSEA BERGEN

NOTES:
A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METER SAFETY ZONE.
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW2.CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 144/17
